description_long: This is a rectangular table with a flat, dark brown to black tabletop and four straight, sturdy legs. The tabletop has a glossy finish, reflecting light and giving it a sleek, modern appearance. The legs are positioned at each corner, providing stable support and are also dark in color, likely made of metal or painted wood. The table's design is minimalist, with no visible decorative elements or additional features such as drawers or shelves. Its proportions suggest it is suitable for use in communal or public spaces, such as parks, outdoor seating areas, or urban plazas. The construction appears robust, making it ideal for frequent use in high-traffic environments.
description: A modern, rectangular table with a glossy dark tabletop and four sturdy, straight legs. The design is minimalist and robust, suitable for urban public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the glossy tabletop and all four legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the table's narrow profile and two visible legs.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the glossy tabletop and all four legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clearer brown tone on the tabletop and two legs visible.
